scenarios.capability: Security scan: detect hardcoded secrets, insecure script patterns, and SSL bypass
scenarios.reason: Agent reads .gitlab-ci.yml from task input and produces a security report — no pipeline execution required

scenarios.capability: Syntax validation: stage references, job definitions, dependency graph (needs), deprecated keywords
scenarios.reason: Agent inspects static YAML structure and schema compliance — entirely text-based analysis

scenarios.capability: Best practices: cache usage, artifact expiration, only/except migration to rules, image pinning
scenarios.reason: Agent reviews pipeline for best-practice patterns and produces actionable suggestions from static analysis

scenarios.capability: Include file validation: detecting errors in locally included template files
scenarios.reason: Agent reads multiple YAML files provided inline and validates include targets — no external access required

scenarios.capability: DAG optimization: identifying sequential pipeline bottlenecks and recommending needs-based parallelism
scenarios.reason: Agent analyzes job dependency structure from static YAML and recommends DAG improvements
